reviews.review_title: Fun game but not scary enough
reviews.review_description: Escape the Cube is a horror escape room game. Its got a good degree of difficulty to it but lacks that scary feel. I like the story part of the game. There are 12 levels although ive only played up to the 6th level as im stuck lol. If you wanted to check out some gameplay there is a video on my channel ClicksterVR

developer_response.body: Your video was really great and thank you for your review :)

reviews.review_description:
Escape The Cube is a escape-room style game built around a minimalist but tense concept: you’re trapped in a series of cube-shaped environments and must solve puzzles, hide, and think your way out before time (or danger) catches up.

At its core, the game blends escape-room logic puzzles with light horror and survival elements. Each room introduces new mechanics or twists.

With room-based progression, it’s easy to jump in, solve one or two puzzles, and stop. That makes it ideal for casual runs.

Don’t expect a deep story. This is more about gameplay and tension than storytelling.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your detailed review. Have fun gaming :)

reviews.review_description: I really liked the idea of a Squid Game/ Saw Like experience - the Escape game is horror themed is a fun selection of different puzzles. It got a story arc which connects all the seperate rooms and you get thrown in the fun. The first ones are pretty easy but they get harder pretty fast. For me a really worthwhile experience, because I generally enjoy puzzlers and it is a nice idea!

developer_response.body: Thank you for your nice review :)

reviews.review_title: Saw meets Squid Games escape room
reviews.review_description:
Interesting idea… it’s kind of an escape room with a cross between “SAW” and “Squid Games”.

There’s a very short tutorial that don’t show much, just tells you tips on how to play, press button on each tip and Exit.

The game comprises of a collection of rooms that you have to work your way through with  timer… fail and you die!. 
You start at room one and each next room unlocks when you complete the current room. 

Some rooms have a timer which you can turn off.

I myself couldn’t work out yet how to get past the second room 🫣 

So far it has been interesting and playable, but hard…. Help me!!!!!

Graphics and sound are ok.. but it’s more about the experience and puzzle solving

developer_response.body: Thank you for your nice review :) Yes, you could say we were inspired by the things you mentioned. And if you focus on the sound in that room, I’m sure you’ll figure out how to pass it :))

reviews.review_description:
So I love a puzzle game, and this was a welcome surprise, not bad graphics, one glitch I had from the go, both my hands went into a piston the tutorial and couldn’t get them back and had to restart, no biggie, 2nd time around no issues.the dolls head room has the…..you know or Squid game vibes, very clever, i like the free movement as most puzzle games are click & point to move.
 I will go in further, but a good start. Nice.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your nice review :) I'm glad you enjoyed the game. I hope you’ll enjoy the later rooms as well :)

reviews.review_description:
I love to play escape room games, but this game has a high level of difficulty among them. This is because it cannot be solved simply by logical thoughts or hidden hints. In the first room, the mechanism of the stage was played several times while dying, but when I actually experienced it, I could feel the tension of the squid game. I solved the second one, but I don't know what the answer is.
It is not simply solved, but a sense of challenge arises in that it is solved somehow.
Merci Lionel!

developer_response.body: Thank you for your kind review :) We hope you'll enjoy the later levels even more!

reviews.review_title: Great Fun with a Few Rough Edges
reviews.review_description:
This has a  Squid Game vibe to it with a good sense of tension.  There are several rooms that as you progress will get harder and harder.  I have dropped into only a few rooms so far and even on easy it takes some working out.  Maybe the devs can have a hint button to help, that said  when you figure out what to do you get that satisfying “aha!” moment when things finally click. The variety of challenges keeps it interesting without feeling repetitive.  A couple of puzzles felt a bit unclear, and at times the logic didn’t flow as smoothly as it could, which can break the immersion slightly. 
It is not perfect and I lost my hand several times where it got stuck on things making it impossible to progress without exiting and restarting but its a if you enjoy problem-solving and a bit of pressure this is for you and I am sure the devs will sort the minor bugs out soon.  With a bit more polish and clearer hints, it could easily be a 5-star experience.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback. We’ll fix a few minor issues with an upcoming update soon. Have fun playing :)

reviews.review_description: overall this is a really engaging and immersive puzzle experience. The concept is simple at first glance—you're trapped in a cube and need to solve a series of interconnected puzzles to escape. The game does a great job of gradually increasing difficulty without overwhelming you right away. Overall, Escape the Cube is one for the library, try if you enjoy escape rooms or puzzle-solving games.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your nice review :)
